holdings.infoBox: PGJ is an equity ETF with a total of 74 individual holdings. The top holdings are JD.com stock at 9.16%, Baidu at 8.53%, Yum China Holdings at 7.46%, Alibaba Group Holding at 7.18%, and NetEase at 6.80%.

overview.description: The Invesco Golden Dragon China ETF (PGJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ Golden Dragon China index, a market-cap-weighted index of Chinese stocks. PGJ was launched on Dec 9, 2004 and is issued by Invesco.
